subject: A spectral spirit-horror wreathed in flame, with a gaunt skull-like face and glowing eyes, its robed form dissolving into smoke and embers
description: A wraith-like figure rises out of a roaring conflagration, its body composed of charred robes and streaming smoke that blur into the surrounding fire. The face is skeletal and sunken, eyes burning bright within hollow sockets, and the silhouette trails upward in tongues of flame. The composition is centered and chest-up, with the firestorm radiating outward in red, orange, and gold rays that fade to a darker scorched border. The lighting is internal — the figure itself is the light source, casting hot rim highlights onto its tattered shroud while everything around it is consumed by glow.
foreground: burning robed spirit with skull-like visage
background: swirling fire and smoke radiating outward
